label: trial_01
phase1_raw:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "CommandRouter",
      "purpose": "Route the incoming command to the appropriate handler function",
      "behavior": "Reads the command field from input and dispatches to the corresponding child function (CreateOrder, PayOrder, ShipOrder, CompleteOrder, CancelOrder, ListOrders, GetUserOrders, ListProducts). Returns the result from the child.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CreateOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle the create_order command",
      "behavior": "Checks user existence, product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, creates order record with status pending, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "PayOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle the pay_order command",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, updates order status to paid, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ShipOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle the ship_order command",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is paid, updates order status to shipped, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CompleteOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle the complete_order command",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is shipped, updates order status to completed, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle the cancel_order command",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is pending or paid, restores stock, refunds user balance if paid, updates order status to cancelled, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListOrders",
      "purpose": "Handle the list_orders command",
      "behavior": "Lists orders with optional filters by user and status, returns the list in data field.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetUserOrders",
      "purpose": "Handle the get_user_orders command",
      "behavior": "Gets all orders for a user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns the result in data field.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListProducts",
      "purpose": "Handle the list_products command",
      "behavior": "Lists products with stock, optionally filters low stock, returns the list in data field.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "decomposition_rationale": "The Order_Management_System is decomposed into a CommandRouter that dispatches to eight command-specific handler functions. Each handler corresponds to one functional requirement (FR-001 to FR-008). This keeps children at the same abstraction level, avoids cross-calls, and ensures the parent directly invokes each child based on the command.",
  "dataflow_edges": [
    {
      "from_node": "parent",
      "from_output": "input",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "input",
      "note": "Parent passes the entire input to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "CreateOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "When command is create_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to CreateOrder"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "PayOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "When command is pay_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to PayOrder"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "ShipOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "When command is ship_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to ShipOrder"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "CompleteOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "When command is complete_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to CompleteOrder"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "CancelOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "When command is cancel_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to CancelOrder"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "ListOrders",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "When command is list_orders, CommandRouter passes order_data to ListOrders"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "GetUserOrders",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "When command is get_user_orders, CommandRouter passes order_data to GetUserOrders"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "ListProducts",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "When command is list_products, CommandRouter passes order_data to ListProducts"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CreateOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "CreateOrder returns result to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "PayOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "PayOrder returns result to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ShipOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "ShipOrder returns result to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CompleteOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "CompleteOrder returns result to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CancelOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "CancelOrder returns result to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListOrders",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "ListOrders returns result to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "GetUserOrders",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "GetUserOrders returns result to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListProducts",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "ListProducts returns result to CommandRouter"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "CommandRouter returns the final result to parent as output"
    }
  ]
}

children.name: CommandRouter
children.purpose: Route the incoming command to the appropriate handler function
children.behavior: Reads the command field from input and dispatches to the corresponding child function (CreateOrder, PayOrder, ShipOrder, CompleteOrder, CancelOrder, ListOrders, GetUserOrders, ListProducts). Returns the result from the child.

children.name: CreateOrder
children.behavior: Checks user existence, product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, creates order record with status pending, and returns success or failure.

children.name: PayOrder
children.behavior: Checks order exists and status is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, updates order status to paid, and returns success or failure.

children.name: ShipOrder
children.behavior: Checks order exists and status is paid, updates order status to shipped, and returns success or failure.

children.name: CompleteOrder
children.behavior: Checks order exists and status is shipped, updates order status to completed, and returns success or failure.

children.name: CancelOrder
children.behavior: Checks order exists and status is pending or paid, restores stock, refunds user balance if paid, updates order status to cancelled, and returns success or failure.

children.name: ListOrders
children.behavior: Lists orders with optional filters by user and status, returns the list in data field.

children.name: GetUserOrders
children.behavior: Gets all orders for a user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns the result in data field.

children.name: ListProducts
children.behavior: Lists products with stock, optionally filters low stock, returns the list in data field.

phase1_parsed.decomposition_rationale: The Order_Management_System is decomposed into a CommandRouter that dispatches to eight command-specific handler functions. Each handler corresponds to one functional requirement (FR-001 to FR-008). This keeps children at the same abstraction level, avoids cross-calls, and ensures the parent directly invokes each child based on the command.

dataflow_edges.note: Parent passes the entire input to CommandRouter
When command is create_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to CreateOrder
When command is pay_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to PayOrder
When command is ship_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to ShipOrder
When command is complete_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to CompleteOrder
When command is cancel_order, CommandRouter passes order_data to CancelOrder
When command is list_orders, CommandRouter passes order_data to ListOrders
When command is get_user_orders, CommandRouter passes order_data to GetUserOrders
When command is list_products, CommandRouter passes order_data to ListProducts
CreateOrder returns result to CommandRouter
PayOrder returns result to CommandRouter
ShipOrder returns result to CommandRouter
CompleteOrder returns result to CommandRouter
CancelOrder returns result to CommandRouter
ListOrders returns result to CommandRouter
GetUserOrders returns result to CommandRouter
ListProducts returns result to CommandRouter
CommandRouter returns the final result to parent as output

children.name: CommandRouter
children.purpose: Route the incoming command to the appropriate handler function
children.behavior: Reads the command field from input and dispatches to the corresponding child function (CreateOrder, PayOrder, ShipOrder, CompleteOrder, CancelOrder, ListOrders, GetUserOrders, ListProducts). Returns the result from the child.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: System input with command and order_data fields

children.stop_reason: CommandRouter is a dispatcher that delegates to specific handlers

children.name: CreateOrder
children.behavior: Checks user existence, product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, creates order record with status pending, and returns success or failure.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing user_id, product_id, quantity

children.stop_reason: CreateOrder is a leaf handler that uses data store interfaces directly

children.name: PayOrder
children.behavior: Checks order exists and status is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, updates order status to paid, and returns success or failure.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing order_id and user_id

children.stop_reason: PayOrder is a leaf handler that uses data store interfaces directly

children.name: ShipOrder
children.behavior: Checks order exists and status is paid, updates order status to shipped, and returns success or failure.
children.stop_reason: ShipOrder is a leaf handler that uses data store interfaces directly

children.name: CompleteOrder
children.behavior: Checks order exists and status is shipped, updates order status to completed, and returns success or failure.
children.stop_reason: CompleteOrder is a leaf handler that uses data store interfaces directly

children.name: CancelOrder
children.behavior: Checks order exists and status is pending or paid, restores stock, refunds user balance if paid, updates order status to cancelled, and returns success or failure.
children.stop_reason: CancelOrder is a leaf handler that uses data store interfaces directly

children.name: ListOrders
children.behavior: Lists orders with optional filters by user and status, returns the list in data field.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing optional user_id and status filters

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Success with list of orders in data field

children.stop_reason: ListOrders is a leaf handler that uses data store interfaces directly

children.name: GetUserOrders
children.behavior: Gets all orders for a user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns the result in data field.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Success with user order statistics in data field

children.stop_reason: GetUserOrders is a leaf handler that uses data store interfaces directly

children.name: ListProducts
children.behavior: Lists products with stock, optionally filters low stock, returns the list in data field.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing optional low_stock_threshold filter

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Success with list of products in data field

children.stop_reason: ListProducts is a leaf handler that uses data store interfaces directly

dataflow_edges.note: Parent passes the entire input to CommandRouter
When command is create_order, CommandRouter extracts and passes order_data to CreateOrder
When command is pay_order, CommandRouter extracts and passes order_data to PayOrder
When command is ship_order, CommandRouter extracts and passes order_data to ShipOrder
When command is complete_order, CommandRouter extracts and passes order_data to CompleteOrder
When command is cancel_order, CommandRouter extracts and passes order_data to CancelOrder
When command is list_orders, CommandRouter extracts and passes order_data to ListOrders
When command is get_user_orders, CommandRouter extracts and passes order_data to GetUserOrders
When command is list_products, CommandRouter extracts and passes order_data to ListProducts
CreateOrder returns result to CommandRouter
PayOrder returns result to CommandRouter
ShipOrder returns result to CommandRouter
CompleteOrder returns result to CommandRouter
CancelOrder returns result to CommandRouter
ListOrders returns result to CommandRouter
GetUserOrders returns result to CommandRouter
ListProducts returns result to CommandRouter
CommandRouter returns the final result to parent as output
